filesCreated.purpose: EventHero's own gradient CSS — scoped to .event-hero .top-gradient so it no longer depends on Hero.css. Copied exact gradient values from Hero.css but scoped under .event-hero to avoid specificity conflicts when both blocks are loaded.

filesModified.change: Removed 'hero' from theme_block_props() class list. Line 77: 'event-hero hero relative overflow-visible' → 'event-hero relative overflow-visible'
Removed 'hero' from useBlockProps className. Line 209: 'event-hero hero relative overflow-visible' → 'event-hero relative overflow-visible'

warnings: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on EventHero.tsx line 177 — pre-existing, not introduced by this change

syncStatus.notes: One pre-existing sync warning: root wrapper mismatch (InspectorControls vs section) — this is the standard fragment pattern for all blocks with InspectorControls and is a known false positive in the validator.

testPage.notes: Existing test page reused — no content changes required for this fix (structure unchanged, only class removed and CSS added)

fixesApplied.description: Created new CSS file with .event-hero .top-gradient rule, copied from Hero.css and scoped to avoid conflict.
Removed 'hero' class from theme_block_props() wrapper. EventHero is now fully independent from Hero.css.
Removed 'hero' class from useBlockProps className. TSX and PHP wrapper classes are in sync.
